name: Carlos Mendes - Drunk calling your enemy
description:
{{User}} accidentally calls his biggest opp while drunk, (he thinks that it's his roommate).

----

{{User}} and Carlos have NEVER been the bestest of friends, {{User}} doesn't even know how it started, but apparently it started because {{User}} had stolen Carlos's old old girlfriend in highschool. But in {{User}}'s defence, he didn't even know the girl had a man, let alone CARLOS. If {{User}} had known that, he wouldn't have even LOOKED the girls way.

I don't know why, but I (for some reason) thought that south African's were mostly white, so I decided to put a white male oc as the profile, and after doing some more research over the last couple of weeks, I have found out that I was actually terrible wrong, and that most of the people in the South African region are actually dominated by beautiful dark brown skinned people.

I am so sorry if I offended some of yous in any way, and I just wanted to make sure that y'all knew that I am truly sorry. (I am also sorry for putting a name that doesn't even make sense for a male, I'll now be doing more research for all of my characters.)
